title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
content: By accessing or using FinEase, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.
We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of FinEase after changes means you accept the updated terms.

title: 2. Use of the Platform
content: FinEase is a personal finance management tool intended for lawful, personal use only.
You agree not to misuse the platform, including attempting to hack, scrape, or disrupt our services.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and all activity under your account.

title: 3. Account Responsibilities
content: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating your FinEase account.
You are solely responsible for all transactions and data entered into your account.
If you suspect unauthorized access to your account, you must notify us immediately at support@finease.com.

title: 4. Data & Privacy
content: Your use of FinEase is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these terms by reference.
We do not sell your personal or financial data to any third party under any circumstances.
You retain full ownership of all data you enter into FinEase.

title: 5. Intellectual Property
content: All content, design, logos, and code within FinEase are the intellectual property of FinEase and protected by applicable laws.
You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute any part of the platform without prior written permission.
User-generated content such as transaction data remains your property — we claim no ownership over it.

title: 6. Limitation of Liability
content: FinEase is provided as-is without warranties of any kind, either express or implied.
We are not liable for any financial decisions made based on data or reports generated by the platform.
In no event shall FinEase be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

title: 7. Termination
content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms of Service.
You may delete your account at any time through your profile settings.
Upon termination, your data will be permanently deleted from our servers within 30 days.
